description: regex metachars in the wrong word are escaped to literals

cases.input: I wrote it in c++ not in cxx.
cases.output: I wrote it in C++ not in cxx.

cases.input: node.js and nodexjs differ (the dot is literal).
cases.output: Node.js and nodexjs differ (the dot is literal).

cases.input: the token a(b) appears once; aXb does not match.
cases.output: the token A-B appears once; aXb does not match.
